title: put_without_field test silently skips in CI without VAULT_TOKEN
description: VaultBackend::from_uri requires VAULT_TOKEN to construct the backend. The new put_without_field_returns_backend_error test gates on VAULT_TOKEN and silently returns if absent. The validation logic (field.is_none() check in put) is the only test coverage for the put-without-field behaviour, and it never runs in a fresh CI environment without Vault credentials. A future refactor that accidentally drops the field check will not be caught by CI. — Fix: move the field check to from_uri as a validation option, or test via a unit-level function that doesn't require a fully-constructed backend.
